root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates part of `executor_test.go` from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues by adopting modern `testing.T` + testify patterns.
fix_pattern: Migrate gocheck-based tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.
